ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "orig_price" TEXT /* Original price of the product */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the product details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the category details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category_map" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Last purchase date of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "coupons" TEXT /* Coupons used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discounted_price" TEXT /* Discounted price of the product at the time of order */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the item (quantity * unit_price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount amount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the promotion is currently active */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the promotion (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_promotions" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion for the product */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion for the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the promotion is currently active for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "promotion_id")
)
